_publications._publicationTitle: Sleep Disorders in Pediatric Patients Affected by Neurofibromatosis Type 1: Reports of a Questionnaire and an Apple Watch Sleep Assessment.

_contextSnippet: NF1 patients experienced a higher frequency of nocturnal awakenings (2.4 ± 1.2 episodes/night) compared to controls (0.8 ± 0.6 episodes/night, p = 0.003)
details: Measured sleep disruption patterns: NF1 patients had higher frequency of nocturnal awakenings (2.4±1.2 vs 0.8±0.6 episodes/night, p=0.003) and more frequent/longer naps (2.1±1.4 vs 1.2±0.8 days/week; 75.4±30.2 vs 38.7±15.6 min, p=0.013)
